concept: Warehouse thriller micro-arc — one woman, one secret, one exit

beats.action_prompt: Establishing wide of industrial loft at dusk, dust motes in window light, empty floor, atmospheric tension, no people visible.
30-year-old British Indian woman in dark olive field jacket and black jeans enters frame in medium three-quarter, motivated side key from factory windows, cautious posture.
beats.speech_text: I came back for one file.

beats.action_prompt: Character freezes mid-step, head turns toward darkness, tension enters frame, push-in begins.
Close-up rack focus from her eyes to shadowed corridor behind, breath catches, jaw tightens.
Slow dolly in as she discovers open metal door she had locked, reversal lands in her expression.
beats.speech_text: The door I locked was open.

beats.action_prompt: Tight close, maximum tension, she whispers without breaking eye-line, hand half-raised.
She pivots to run, wide isolation or pull-back on motion peak, button beat as she exits frame.
